articles.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
articles.description: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: FTC gives Musk the OK to acquire SpaceX alumni startup Mesh
articles.description: Mesh came out of stealth in February with a $50 million Series A.
articles.author: Marina Temkin
